text:
Created attachment 180008
phplist_update_to_3.3.1

There is new version of mail/phplist. I've made a patch which updates port. This patch was tested with poudriere. You can check logfile at http://uld.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/10x64-testing/2017-02-15_10h28m52s/logs/phplist-3.2.7.log
